moduleDescription:
This module provides access to the inferred .raises effects for Nim's macro system. Since: Version 1.4.

One can test for the existence of this standard module via defined(nimHasEffectTraitsModule).

entries.name: getRaisesList
entries.code: proc getRaisesList(fn: NimNode): NimNode {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Extracts the .raises list of the func/proc/etc fn. fn has to be a resolved symbol of kind nnkSym. This implies that the macro that calls this proc should accept typed arguments and not untyped arguments.

entries.name: getTagsList
entries.code: proc getTagsList(fn: NimNode): NimNode {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Extracts the .tags list of the func/proc/etc fn. fn has to be a resolved symbol of kind nnkSym. This implies that the macro that calls this proc should accept typed arguments and not untyped arguments.

entries.name: getForbidsList
entries.code: proc getForbidsList(fn: NimNode): NimNode {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Extracts the .forbids list of the func/proc/etc fn. fn has to be a resolved symbol of kind nnkSym. This implies that the macro that calls this proc should accept typed arguments and not untyped arguments.

entries.name: isGcSafe
entries.code: proc isGcSafe(fn: NimNode): bool {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Return true if the func/proc/etc fn is gcsafe. fn has to be a resolved symbol of kind nnkSym. This implies that the macro that calls this proc should accept typed arguments and not untyped arguments.

entries.name: hasNoSideEffects
entries.code: proc hasNoSideEffects(fn: NimNode): bool {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Return true if the func/proc/etc fn has noSideEffect. fn has to be a resolved symbol of kind nnkSym. This implies that the macro that calls this proc should accept typed arguments and not untyped arguments.
